name: textarea
description: A token-styled, form-associated multi-line text input: submits its value under `name` in a plain POST form and fires native input/change events, so l:model binds with zero config.
docs: Register <lv-textarea> by importing components/ui/textarea.ts from your entry point. Set `name` to submit the value in a plain HTML form (form-associated: ElementInternals where supported, hidden mirror otherwise). Bind with l:model (native input/change) or listen for lv-input / lv-change.
